message:
Fix critical oversight: wire up missing CLI commands

The main() switch statement was missing several commands that had
implementations defined elsewhere in the plan:

Added to switch:
- suggest (semantic suggestion)
- export (export to SKILL.md or markdown)
- bundles (list bundles)
- bundle show <id> (show bundle details)
- categories (list all categories)
- tags (list all tags with counts)
- about (ecosystem info)

New implementations added:
- categoriesCommand() - List categories with counts
- tagsCommand() - List tags sorted by usage
- bundlesCommand() - List prompt bundles
- bundleShowCommand() - Show bundle details

Updated:
- showHelp() - Now includes all new commands
- showQuickStart() - Added suggest, bundles, about
- VERSION constant - Added to CLI imports
- --version flag - Now uses VERSION constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
